_comment: Parade Ground: the main menu's new no-enemy battle option, shown with the real default spawn (drill:true, no scenario override) so the clip matches exactly what pressing the button produces -- the standard 5-unit player line (seed 12345: Spearmen/Infantry/Archers/Cavalry/Cavalry, uid 0-4, x 476.75-1123.25, y 300) and zero enemy units. The whole line is box-selected, then ordered forward as a group with a single move click, so it marches south holding formation and settles -- ordinary maneuver controls, free of any opponent, which is the rehearsal space the feature adds. Driven live through the real SelectionManager by tools/demo/DemoInputRecorder.gd; world coordinates; physics ticks (60/s).
